name: Authentic Economy — Daily Outreach Queue Sender
description: Triggers outreach-queue-worker daily at 9am UTC to send queued cold outreach emails via Resend. Covers EU DPP, QRON Genesis, and StrainChain dispensary campaigns.

modules.name: Log result to D1 via bitcoin-auth-worker health

notes: Activate in Make.com. Add INTERNAL_API_KEY env variable. Worker polls D1 outreach_queue for status=pending AND scheduled_at <= now(). Resend quota: 3000/day on free plan, resets midnight UTC.
